description: Style NoteAn all-time favourite accessory, belts are an integral part of creating the well groomed look. This genuine leather belt from turtle is set to add an sophisticated edge to your style. Also, every time you purchase a Turtle product, part of the proceeds go towards protecting and conserving turtles. This is part of the Save Turtle project created in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa. Product DetailsBrown textured belt with a tang claspFixed loop and holes to customise the FitBranding embossed at the end of the belt Material and CareGenuine leatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner to maintain belt quality if necessary SizeLength: 121 cm
